overall.description: Gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a samurai character walking through a Japanese mountain temple complex at night. The character ascends stone stairs, passes through a red torii gate, and enters the Golden Temple courtyard illuminated by lanterns and campfires.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow mountain path at night, flanked by large rock formations and illuminated stone lanterns. Yellow autumn leaves cover the ground and trees line the route ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long flight of stone stairs lined with imposing guardian statues. The stairs cut through the rocky mountainside with stone lanterns marking the path.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense forest of yellow autumn trees, approaching a large red temple gate illuminated by warm lanterns. A five-story pagoda becomes visible in the distance beyond the gate.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the red gate into the open Golden Temple courtyard, where campfires burn and villagers gather. The five-story pagoda towers in the background while a white ox stands near a fire on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded mountain trail into the vibrant, illuminated courtyard of a grand temple complex. It begins along a narrow night path flanked by rock formations and stone lanterns, with yellow autumn leaves carpeting the ground. As the character advances, the terrain shifts upward into a long flight of stone stairs lined with imposing guardian statues that cut through the rocky mountainside. The scene then transitions through a dense forest of golden trees toward a large red temple gate, where a five-story pagoda first emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera passes through the gate to open into the Golden Temple courtyard, revealing burning campfires, gathering villagers, and a white ox standing beside the towering pagoda.
